timing_boundary: The sole observed official commit is more than three months after immutable arXiv v1. Release behavior is inspected as post-v1 evidence and is not attributed to the paper-time implementation.
inspection: Complete tracked tree inspected, with targeted full reads of runners, memory interface, and domain graders. The repository calls itself a preview, depends on Hugging Face datasets and external services, and contains no paper result tables, per-run predictions, seeds, or repeated-trial records.
